title: T-013 — /api/oee/summary + export Server endpoints (OEE §10.3, §15.4 OEE-M-002)
prompt:
# T-013 — Daily summary + export API endpoints

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.3 (Per-day OEE Summary), §15.4 OEE-M-002 (Export OEE Snapshot), §11 V-OEE-ACCESS
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Two Server endpoints powering OEE-003: (a) daily summary loader reading oee_daily_summary MV + per-line 7-day sparkline data, (b) export Server Action queuing a background CSV/PDF export job (reuses 12-REPORTING export engine per OEE-M-002 translation note) — writes `report_exports` audit row + returns jobId.

## Pre-flight
Read: oee_daily_summary MV (T-007); existing 12-REPORTING export engine entrypoint (queue API + report_exports table); Wave1 T-117 tracer; Wave1 T-121 rate-limit.

## Implementation contract
1. Server loader `apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/loader.ts`: accepts `date: ISO date`, `lineFilter?: string`, `sort?: column+dir`; reads oee_daily_summary WHERE date=:date AND org_id=app.current_org_id() with optional line filter; returns shape `{ rows: SummaryRow[], factoryAvg: { oee, a, p, q, totalOutput, totalDowntime }, sparklines: Record<line_id, number[]>, lastRefreshedAt: Date, isStale: boolean (lastRefreshedAt > 20 min ago) }`. Sparklines pull 7-day rolling per-line oee_pct from oee_daily_summary.
2. Export Server Action `apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/actions/export.ts`: accepts `{ date, format: 'csv'|'pdf', sections: { kpis, table, sparklines } }`; validates Zod payload; checks permission `oee.export.csv` or `oee.export.pdf` via role_permissions; calls 12-REPORTING `enqueueExportJob` (existing engine) with payload — writes `report_exports` audit row tagged source='15-oee' BEFORE return; returns `{ jobId, filenamePreview }`.
3. Optional Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/oee/summary/route.ts` for JSON refresh.
4. Auth: withOrgContext (Wave1 T-125), report_access_gate_v1 (V-OEE-ACCESS-2), Wave1 T-121 rate-limit (60 req/min for summary; 6 exports/min/user).
5. Observability: T-117 trace span on every call; T-118 counter `oee_export_jobs_enqueued`.
6. Vitest: (a) 401/403 access gates, (b) RLS isolation across orgs, (c) `isStale=true` when oee_daily_summary.last_refreshed_at > 20 min, (d) export action enqueues job + writes report_exports row + returns jobId, (e) permission check rejects user without oee.export.csv for csv requests, (f) export rate-limit 6/min/user.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/loader.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/actions/export.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/oee/summary/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/__tests__/loader.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/actions/__tests__/export.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given no session, when GET /api/oee/summary?date=2026-04-20 runs, then response is 401 (V-OEE-ACCESS-1).
2. Given valid session and oee_daily_summary with last_refreshed_at 25 min ago, when loader runs, then `isStale=true` in the returned payload.
3. Given a user with oee.export.csv permission, when export action runs with format='csv', then it calls 12-REPORTING enqueueExportJob exactly once, writes a `report_exports` row tagged source='15-oee', and returns `{ jobId, filenamePreview }`.
4. Given a user WITHOUT oee.export.pdf permission, when export action runs with format='pdf', then it throws a permission error and does NOT enqueue.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee/summary-loader + export-action asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/summary`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement an OEE-specific export engine — reuse 12-REPORTING enqueueExportJob (OEE-M-002 translation note).
- Do not skip `report_exports` audit row write — translation note + §14.4 GDPR audit traceability.
- Do not run the export synchronously — always enqueue background job (Wave1 T-111 worker consumes).
- Do not bypass Wave1 T-121 rate-limits (separate buckets for summary load vs export enqueue).
- Do not skip permission split between csv/pdf — T-001 enum locks both strings.

pipeline_inputs.description: Daily summary Server loader + export Server Action (reuses 12-REPORTING engine) with permission split csv/pdf + audit row + stale-after-20-min flag + rate-limit.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drives OEE-003 (T-016) + OEE-M-002 modal. Export delegates to 12-REPORTING engine per OEE-M-002 translation note; background job consumed by Wave1 T-111 worker. Stale flag at 20 min reflects oee_daily_summary 15-min refresh + 5-min grace.
